content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the car well-centered on the straight portion transitioning into the curve.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 17 + 5 = 22
Waypoint 22: (6.354062, 0.698517)
Car position: (5.534372, 0.657692)
Bearing = atan2(0.698517 - 0.657692, 6.354062 - 5.534372) = atan2(0.040825, 0.819690) ≈ 2.85°
Delta = 2.85 - (-1.112) = 3.96° → nearly straight, tiny left bias, no correction needed
